FOREST AND CLIMATE CHANGE NOTIFICATION New Delhi, die 31st August. 2015 S.O. 2571(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) and clause (v) of sub-section (2) of Section 3 of the Environment (Protection) Act, 1986, read with clause sub-rule (4) of rule 5 of the Environment (Protection) Rules, 1986, die Central Government hereby makes the following amendment to the notification of the Government of India. Ministry of Environment. Forest & Climate Change dated the 14lh September. 2006 published in die Gazette of India. Pat II. Section 3, sub-section (ii) extraordinary vide S.O. 1533 (E) dated the 14lh September. 2006. naraely:- Tn the said notification, in paragraph 9. in sub-paragraph (ii). in die first proviso, for the words “period of seven years", die words ‘’period of three years" shall be substituted. |F. No. J-11013/12/2013-1A-II (I) (part)] MANOJ KUMAR SINGH. Jt. Secy. Note : The principal rules were published in rhe Gazette of InJia. Extraordinary. Part II. Section 3.
